findings.title: Validated Supabase JWT is unconditionally promoted to admin
findings.requiredRepair: Remove testing branch and derive roles only from governed server-side profile and authorization data.

findings.title: Active-subscription enforcement always passes
findings.requiredRepair: Restore fail-closed subscription checks with explicit admin and test-user policy.

findings.title: Legacy shared user key is public and enabled by backend default
findings.requiredRepair: Default legacy-key support off and remove the shared key from public assets.

findings.title: Cron path prefixes bypass role authorization
findings.requiredRepair: Require a dedicated scheduler credential using constant-time comparison and explicit route middleware.

findings.title: Mutation-capable pipeline and internal fixture routes lack explicit authentication
findings.requiredRepair: Mount explicit admin or scheduler middleware before request handling.

findings.title: Server startup performs FORCE_BOOT_TEST writes using a privileged-key preference chain
findings.requiredRepair: Remove automatic test writes and prohibit anon-key fallback for privileged database operations.

findings.title: New RLS-enabled proof tables have zero explicit policies
findings.requiredRepair: Seal server-only ownership or implement least-privilege policies in a separately approved migration packet.

findings.title: Service-role, subscriber, scheduler and Scout M2M credential boundaries are not operationally separated
findings.requiredRepair: Define distinct ownership, purpose, rotation, storage and revocation laws for every credential class.

nextAction: ESEC-001-C1 PASS WITH CRITICAL BLOCKERS. Next separately authorize ESEC-001-I1 fail-closed authentication and subscriber-boundary remediation: remove unconditional JWT admin/subscription bypasses, disable the public legacy user key, replace cron path bypasses with explicit authenticated scheduler credentials, protect mutation routes, remove startup test writes, and seal service-role/Scout M2M credential isolation. Do not execute E2E proof or clear any runtime gate.
